title: Bhadohi Heat Wave
lead: Bhadohi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.14. The city's temperature has reached a critical level with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bhadohi is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 61%, and the wind speed is approximately 8.7 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The city's residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe during this critical period, as the heat wave is expected to continue.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
